## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] `pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint` pass locally
- [ ] Core-logic changes have colocated vitest coverage; UI changes verified in the demo app
- [ ] User-facing changes have an entry under `## [Unreleased]` in `packages/chat-kit/CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] New public API exports were added deliberately to `packages/chat-kit/src/index.ts` and documented in `docs/`
